User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the RestauranteFlow application, such as a cashier, administrator, or kitchen staff. This entity stores profile information and links the user to their assigned branch and role.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

firstName.description: The first name of the user.

lastName.description: The last name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user, used for communication and identification.

role.description: The role of the user within the application (e.g., 'Admin', 'Cashier', 'KitchenStaff'), determining their access and permissions.

branchId.description: Reference to the Branch where the user is primarily assigned. (Relationship: Branch 1:N User)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was last updated.

Branch.title: Branch
Branch.description: Represents a physical location or store of the RestauranteFlow business. Each branch has its own menu, orders, and associated users.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Branch entity.

name.description: The official name of the branch.

address.description: The physical address of the branch location.

phoneNumber.description: The contact phone number for the branch.

taxRate.description: The applicable tax rate for sales at this branch (e.g., 0.08 for 8%).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the branch record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the branch record was last updated.
